subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath been faithful to the Covenant, who hath shown patience for the sake of God, and who hath remained firm in the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی الذی کان بالعهد وفیا و صبر فی جنب الله و کان فی الامر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
